_comment: Phase-2 traffic-advisor integration fixture. User is south of LSZH heading 360 (north). One target sits ~5 NM north of the user, head-on (track 180), at +500 ft. The user is in established TOWER contact in the scenario, so the advisor's gate passes; the target sits inside the 2-8 NM forward arc with positive closure, so an advisory should fire. Target B is 6 o'clock and far behind — must NOT trigger.

targets._comment: 6 o'clock — must be filtered out by the forward-arc gate.
